'''âsh-f-th''' ('''kashafath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pumice|pumice]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pumice|pumice]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-f-th
|-
! Lemma
| kashafath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishafath|thishafath]] || [[word:jishafath|jishafath]] || [[word:shishafath|shishafath]] || [[word:kishafath|kishafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushafath|thuthushafath]] || [[word:jujushafath|jujushafath]] || [[word:shushushafath|shushushafath]] || [[word:kukushafath|kukushafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushafath|thushafath]] || [[word:jushafath|jushafath]] || [[word:shushafath|shushafath]] || [[word:kushafath|kushafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushafath|thushafath]] || [[word:jushafath|jushafath]] || [[word:shushafath|shushafath]] || [[word:kushafath|kushafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshafath|theshafath]] || [[word:jeshafath|jeshafath]] || [[word:sheshafath|sheshafath]] || [[word:keshafath|keshafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshafath|thothoshafath]] || [[word:jojoshafath|jojoshafath]] || [[word:shoshoshafath|shoshoshafath]] || [[word:kokoshafath|kokoshafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshafath|thoshafath]] || [[word:joshafath|joshafath]] || [[word:shoshafath|shoshafath]] || [[word:koshafath|koshafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshafath|thoshafath]] || [[word:joshafath|joshafath]] || [[word:shoshafath|shoshafath]] || [[word:koshafath|koshafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshafath|thĂŠshafath]] || [[word:jĂŠshafath|jĂŠshafath]] || [[word:shĂŠshafath|shĂŠshafath]] || [[word:kĂŠshafath|kĂŠshafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashafath|thathashafath]] || [[word:jajashafath|jajashafath]] || [[word:shashashafath|shashashafath]] || [[word:kakashafath|kakashafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashafath|thashafath]] || [[word:jashafath|jashafath]] || [[word:shashafath|shashafath]] || [[word:kashafath|kashafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashafath|thashafath]] || [[word:jashafath|jashafath]] || [[word:shashafath|shashafath]] || [[word:kashafath|kashafath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashafath|shashafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashafath|goshashafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashafath|gokishashafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashafathnĂŒ|shashafathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashafathnknĂŒ|goshashafathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafathnĂŒ|gokishashafathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashafathshĂ«|shashafathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashafathnkshĂ«|goshashafathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashafathshĂ«|gokishashafathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafathro|shashafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafathnkro|goshashafathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafathro|gokishashafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafathmu|shashafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafathnkmu|goshashafathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafathmu|gokishashafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashafathsher|shashafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashafathnksher|goshashafathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashafathsher|gokishashafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashafathng|shashafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashafathnkng|goshashafathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashafathng|gokishashafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashafathya|shashafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashafathnkya|goshashafathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashafathya|gokishashafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashafathyam|shashafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashafathnkyam|goshashafathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashafathyam|gokishashafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafathnĂŒshĂ«|shashafathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashafathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashafathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafathnĂŒro|shashafathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafathnknĂŒro|goshashafathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafathnĂŒro|gokishashafathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafathnĂŒmu|shashafathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafathnknĂŒmu|goshashafathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafathnĂŒmu|gokishashafathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafathshĂ«nĂŒ|shashafathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashafathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashafathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafathshĂ«ro|shashafathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafathnkshĂ«ro|goshashafathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafathshĂ«ro|gokishashafathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafathshĂ«mu|shashafathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafathnkshĂ«mu|goshashafathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafathshĂ«mu|gokishashafathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafathronĂŒ|shashafathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafathnkronĂŒ|goshashafathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafathronĂŒ|gokishashafathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafathroshĂ«|shashafathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafathnkroshĂ«|goshashafathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafathroshĂ«|gokishashafathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashafathromu|shashafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashafathnkromu|goshashafathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashafathromu|gokishashafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashafathmunĂŒ|shashafathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashafathnkmunĂŒ|goshashafathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashafathmunĂŒ|gokishashafathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashafathmushĂ«|shashafathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashafathnkmushĂ«|goshashafathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashafathmushĂ«|gokishashafathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashafathmuro|shashafathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashafathnkmuro|goshashafathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashafathmuro|gokishashafathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
